PURPLE

"i wannaa goooo"

it/its

  • HOME
  • CHARACTERS

ABOUT

  • name: PURPLE

  • personality: ENFP-T

  • dob: Jan 3

  • age: 13

  • gender: none

  • species: wolf/cat (switches)

  • height: 5'2

  • relatives: HIGHLIGHTS (best friend / partner)

  • other: has ADHD and Autism

  • Patterns are all dye! So it can change the patterns if it wants too!!

  • SUPER ENERGETIC

LIKES

  • friends

  • running and jumping around

  • being licked and licking people

DISLIKES

  • yelling

  • mean people

HIGHLIGHTS

"..."

it/its (object)

  • HOME
  • CHARACTERS

ABOUT

  • name: HIGHLIGHTS

  • personality: ISTJ-T

  • dob: Sep 6

  • age: 26

  • gender: none

  • species: robot

  • height: 5'11

  • relatives: PURPLE ("friend" / "partner")

  • other: incredibly anti-social

  • unable to experience emotion

  • designed by PURPLE to be it's friend

LIKES

  • full charge

  • wire replacement

  • idea of emotion

DISLIKES

  • low charge

  • being a robot
